creator: girgen@partitur.se
text:
There seems to be a bug in pdf lib:

Due to an unclean implementation of the pdflib 0.6 the internal
closing of the document also closes the file. This should not be done
because pdflib didn't open the file, but expects an already open file
when PDF_open() is called. Consequently it shouldn't close the
file. In order to fix this just take out line 190 of the file
p_basic.c in the pdflib source distribution until the next release of
pdflib will fix this.
[http://www.php.net/manual/function.pdf-close.php3]

Also, the port does not honor the CC environment variable.

How-To-Repeat: 
	<Code/input/activities to reproduce the problem (multiple
lines)>
